hc658d95cg5c5bg4343gab7eg4976e2efe40c: I saw you training those children. You were so gentle! That's... not how I was taught.
hbb9c73dcgef4dg4884gabcegfc20c632caef: Cruel words strengthen neither heads nor hearts, Shadowheart.
h555a92a7ge444g4171g9859g1ae7961e42ce: I wouldn't quite say that - I learned the lesson, after all.
h63b000afga086g49cbgbcd5g363ecf25e3ca: And came to resent your tutor, I bet. I taught them to fight - not to hate.
